caption: Step 1: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
description: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
narration: Let's start by opening the Indian eVisa portal home page. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

caption: Step 2: Open the eVisa application form start page
description: Open the eVisa application form start page
narration: Next, we open the eVisa application form start page. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

caption: Step 3: Select nationality, passport type, and port of arrival
description: Select nationality, passport type, and port of arrival
narration: From there, we select nationality, passport type, and port of arrival. This keeps the flow deterministic instead of relying on page defaults.

caption: Step 4: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
description: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
narration: Now we fill date of birth and email confirmation. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

caption: Step 5: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
description: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
narration: After that, we choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days). Making the choice visible keeps the demo reproducible.

caption: Step 6: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
description: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
narration: Next, we set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions. Being explicit here keeps reruns consistent.

caption: Step 7: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
description: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
narration: We intentionally stop at the captcha step here. That way the walkthrough stays safe while still showing the exact handoff point.
